name: Dr Colette Harris
title: Reader in Gender and Development
expertise_topics: My research interests centre on gender and micro-political power. This includes exploring the relationship between masculinities
and between gender and religion. I also put into practice and research the workings and impact of post-Freirean
particularly focused through participatory gender analysis with a further specialism in public health education
research_interests: My research interests centre on gender and micro-political power. This includes exploring the relationship between masculinities, femininities, and violence, and between gender and religion. I also put into practice and research the workings and impact of post-Freirean, community-based pedagogies, particularly focused through participatory gender analysis with a further specialism in public health education.
